All I Ching FAQ
Responsible Use

Can I use the I Ching for serious decisions?

Use it for reflection, not as a substitute for medical, legal, financial, safety, or professional advice.

DirectoryUse it as a mirrorPractical boundary

Use it as a mirror

A reading can organize thoughts and reveal assumptions. It cannot verify facts or carry responsibility for high-stakes decisions.

Practical boundary

For serious matters, use qualified help, evidence, and personal responsibility.
